revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:October 25 (old lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of October 25 (old lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦10月25日'''は[[旧暦]][[10月 (旧暦)|10月]]の25日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[承元]]元年（[[1207年]]_月_日） - 承元に改元 * [[寛永]]14年（[[1637年]]_月_日） - [[島原の乱]]。天草・島原の農民が藩・領主の圧政、キリシタン弾圧に反抗して蜂起 * [[明治]]元年（[[1868年]]_月_日） - [[榎本武揚]]らが北海道・箱館の[[五稜郭]]を占領
== 誕生日 == * [[文禄]]元年（[[1592年]]_月_日） - [[ホンタイジ]]（皇太極）、[[清]]の2代皇帝（+ [[1643年]]） * [[明治]]元年（[[1868年]]_月_日） - [[徳富蘆花]]、[[小説家]]（+ [[1927年]]）
== 忌日 ==
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[10月24日 (旧暦)|10月24日]] 翌日[[10月26日 (旧暦)|10月26日]] - 前月[[9月25日 (旧暦)|9月25日]] 翌月[[11月25日 (旧暦)|11月25日]] *新暦[[10月25日]]
{{msg:stub}}

1 revision imported: importing jawiki history before translation, of all the 12 lunar months

revision.text:
{{旧暦10月}} '''旧暦10月25日'''は[[10月 (旧暦)|旧暦10月]]の25日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[承元]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1207年]][[11月16日]]） - [[建永]]から承元に[[改元]] * [[寛永]]14年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1637年]][[12月11日]]） - [[島原の乱]]。天草・島原の農民が藩・領主の圧政、キリシタン弾圧に反抗して蜂起 * [[安政]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1858年]][[11月30日]]） - [[徳川家茂]]、十四代将軍に就任 * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[12月8日]]） - [[榎本武揚]]らが北海道・箱館の[[五稜郭]]を占領
== 誕生日 == * [[万暦]]20年（グレゴリオ暦[[1592年]][[11月28日]]） - [[ホンタイジ]]（皇太極）<ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Abahai Abahai Manchurian leader] [[ブリタニカ百科事典|Encyclopædia Britannica]]</ref>、[[清]]の2代[[皇帝]]（+ [[1643年]]） * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[12月8日]]） - [[徳富蘆花]]、[[小説家]]（+ [[1927年]]）
== 忌日 == == 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|24|10|26|9|25|11|10|1025}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:10月25日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]]

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:旧暦10月]] to [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{旧暦10月}} '''旧暦10月25日'''は[[10月 (旧暦)|旧暦10月]]の25日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[承元]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1207年]][[11月16日]]） - [[建永]]から承元に[[改元]] * [[寛永]]14年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1637年]][[12月11日]]） - [[島原の乱]]。天草・島原の農民が藩・領主の圧政、キリシタン弾圧に反抗して蜂起 * [[安政]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1858年]][[11月30日]]） - [[徳川家茂]]、十四代将軍に就任 * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[12月8日]]） - [[榎本武揚]]らが北海道・箱館の[[五稜郭]]を占領
== 誕生日 == * [[万暦]]20年（グレゴリオ暦[[1592年]][[11月28日]]） - [[ホンタイジ]]（皇太極）<ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Abahai Abahai Manchurian leader] [[ブリタニカ百科事典|Encyclopædia Britannica]]</ref>、[[清]]の2代[[皇帝]]（+ [[1643年]]） * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[12月8日]]） - [[徳富蘆花]]、[[小説家]]（+ [[1927年]]）

== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|24|10|26|9|25|11|10|1025}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:10月25日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunar October]]

{{Lunar October}} '''Lunar October25日'''は[[10月 (旧暦)|Lunar October]]の25日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[承元]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1207年]][[11月16日]]） - [[建永]]から承元に[[改元]] * [[寛永]]14年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1637年]][[12月11日]]） - [[島原の乱]]。天草・島原の農民が藩・領主の圧政、キリシタン弾圧に反抗して蜂起 * [[安政]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1858年]][[11月30日]]） - [[徳川家茂]]、十四代将軍に就任 * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[12月8日]]） - [[榎本武揚]]らが北海道・箱館の[[五稜郭]]を占領
== 誕生日 == * [[万暦]]20年（グレゴリオ暦[[1592年]][[11月28日]]） - [[ホンタイジ]]（皇太極）<ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Abahai Abahai Manchurian leader] [[ブリタニカ百科事典|Encyclopædia Britannica]]</ref>、[[清]]の2代[[皇帝]]（+ [[1643年]]） * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[12月8日]]） - [[徳富蘆花]]、[[小説家]]（+ [[1927年]]）
== 忌日 == == 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|24|10|26|9|25|11|10|1025}}
[[Category:japanese Lunar Calendar]][[ja:10月25日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunar October]]

adding boilerplate intro to all the days

trying to comment out all the bad overview sections I made earlier
adding these as a part 1 of a few steps to get names on the things

I think this is the glitch source

removing the annoying spaces that make editing harder
putting this here so I can replace it to insert all necessary interlanguage links into it
doing a mass replace to get the proper intweriki links for all the dates

[[sn:October 25 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 25일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月25日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 25일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿五]] [[zh:十月廿五]] [[en:draft:October 25 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 25''' is the 25th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Shōgen|ja|承元}}元年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1207|ja|1207}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}}） – The era was changed from {{ill|Ken'ei|ja|建永}} to {{ill|Shōgen|ja|承元}}. * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}}14年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1637|ja|1637}} {{ill|December 11|ja|12月11日}}） – The Shimabara Rebellion: Farmers from Amakusa and Shimabara rose against oppressive daimyō and anti-Christian policies. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}5年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1858|ja|1858}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}}） – {{ill|Tokugawa Iemochi|ja|徳川家茂}} ascended as the 14th shōgun. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}元年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868}} {{ill|December 8|ja|12月8日}}） – Enomoto Takeaki and others occupied the five-pointed star fortress, {{ill|Goryōkaku|ja|五稜郭}}, in Hakodate.
== Births == * {{ill|Manrei|ja|万暦}}20年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1592|ja|1592}} {{ill|November 28|ja|11月28日}}） – {{ill|Hontai-ji|ja|ホンタイジ}} (皇太極), the 2nd emperor of the Qing († {{ill|1643|ja|1643}}). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}元年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868}} {{ill|December 8|ja|12月8日}}） – {{ill|Tokutomi Roka|ja|徳富蘆花}}, a novelist († {{ill|1927|ja|1927}}).
== Deaths ==
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|24|10|26|9|25|11|10|1025}}

[[sn:October 25 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 25일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月25日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 25일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿五]] [[zh:十月廿五]] [[en:draft:October 25 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 25''' is the 25th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Shōgen|ja|承元}}1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1207|ja|1207}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}}） – The era was changed from {{ill|Ken'ei|ja|建永}} to {{ill|Shōgen|ja|承元}}. * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}}14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1637|ja|1637}} {{ill|December 11|ja|12月11日}}） – The Shimabara Rebellion: Farmers from Amakusa and Shimabara rose against oppressive daimyō and anti-Christian policies. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1858|ja|1858}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}}） – {{ill|Tokugawa Iemochi|ja|徳川家茂}} ascended as the 14th shōgun. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868}} {{ill|December 8|ja|12月8日}}） – Enomoto Takeaki and others occupied the five-pointed star fortress, {{ill|Goryōkaku|ja|五稜郭}}, in Hakodate.
== Births == * {{ill|Manrei|ja|万暦}}20th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1592|ja|1592}} {{ill|November 28|ja|11月28日}}） – {{ill|Hontai-ji|ja|ホンタイジ}} (皇太極), the 2nd emperor of the Qing († {{ill|1643|ja|1643}}). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868}} {{ill|December 8|ja|12月8日}}） – {{ill|Tokutomi Roka|ja|徳富蘆花}}, a novelist († {{ill|1927|ja|1927}}).
== Deaths ==
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|24|10|26|9|25|11|10|1025}}
[[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[sn:October 25 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 25일]] [[ja:10月25日 (旧暦)]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[sn:October 25 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 25일]] [[Category:Lunar October]] [[Category:Lunar_Calendar_Days]][[sn:October 25 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[Category:Lunar_Calendar_Days]]

[[sn:October 25 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 25일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月25日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 25일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿五]] [[zh:十月廿五]] [[en:draft:October 25 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 25''' is the 25th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Shōgen|ja|承元}}1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1207|ja|1207}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}}） – The era was changed from {{ill|Ken'ei|ja|建永}} to {{ill|Shōgen|ja|承元}}. * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}}14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1637|ja|1637}} {{ill|December 11|ja|12月11日}}） – The Shimabara Rebellion: Farmers from Amakusa and Shimabara rose against oppressive daimyō and anti-Christian policies. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1858|ja|1858}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}}） – {{ill|Tokugawa Iemochi|ja|徳川家茂}} ascended as the 14th shōgun. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868}} {{ill|December 8|ja|12月8日}}） – Enomoto Takeaki and others occupied the five-pointed star fortress, {{ill|Goryōkaku|ja|五稜郭}}, in Hakodate.
== Births == * {{ill|Manrei|ja|万暦}}20th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1592|ja|1592}} {{ill|November 28|ja|11月28日}}） – {{ill|Hontai-ji|ja|ホンタイジ}} (皇太極), the 2nd emperor of the Qing († {{ill|1643|ja|1643}}). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868}} {{ill|December 8|ja|12月8日}}） – {{ill|Tokutomi Roka|ja|徳富蘆花}}, a novelist († {{ill|1927|ja|1927}}).
== Deaths ==
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|24|10|26|9|25|11|10|1025}}

== Events == * {{ill|Shōgen|ja|承元}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1207|ja|1207}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – The era was changed from {{ill|Ken'ei|ja|建永}} to {{ill|Shōgen|ja|承元}} . * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1637|ja|1637}} {{ill|December 11|ja|12月11日}} ） – The Shimabara Rebellion: Farmers from Amakusa and Shimabara rose against oppressive daimyō and anti-Christian policies. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1858|ja|1858}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}} ） – {{ill|Tokugawa Iemochi|ja|徳川家茂}} ascended as the 14th shōgun. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868}} {{ill|December 8|ja|12月8日}} ） – Enomoto Takeaki and others occupied the five-pointed star fortress, {{ill|Goryōkaku|ja|五稜郭}} , in Hakodate.

== Events == * {{ill|Shōgen|ja|承元}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1207|ja|1207}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – The era was changed from {{ill|Ken'ei|ja|建永}} to {{ill|Shōgen|ja|承元}} . * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1637|ja|1637}} {{ill|December 11|ja|12月11日}} ） – The Shimabara Rebellion: Farmers from Amakusa and Shimabara rose against oppressive daimyō and anti-Christian policies. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1858|ja|1858}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}} ） – {{ill|Tokugawa Iemochi|ja|徳川家茂}} ascended as the 14th shōgun. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868}} {{ill|December 8|ja|12月8日}} ） – Enomoto Takeaki and others occupied the five-pointed star fortress, {{ill|Goryōkaku|ja|五稜郭}} , in Hakodate.
== Births == * {{ill|Manrei|ja|万暦}} 20th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1592|ja|1592}} {{ill|November 28|ja|11月28日}} ） – {{ill|Hontai-ji|ja|ホンタイジ}} (皇太極), the 2nd emperor of the Qing († {{ill|1643|ja|1643}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868}} {{ill|December 8|ja|12月8日}} ） – {{ill|Tokutomi Roka|ja|徳富蘆花}} , a novelist († {{ill|1927|ja|1927}} ).

== Commemorations ==

revision.text:
[[sn:October 25 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 25일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月25日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 25일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿五]] [[zh:十月廿五]] [[en:draft:October 25 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 25''' is the 25th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Shōgen|ja|承元}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1207|ja|1207}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – The era was changed from {{ill|Ken'ei|ja|建永}} to {{ill|Shōgen|ja|承元}} . * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1637|ja|1637}} {{ill|December 11|ja|12月11日}} ） – The Shimabara Rebellion: Farmers from Amakusa and Shimabara rose against oppressive daimyō and anti-Christian policies. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1858|ja|1858}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}} ） – {{ill|Tokugawa Iemochi|ja|徳川家茂}} ascended as the 14th shōgun. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868}} {{ill|December 8|ja|12月8日}} ） – Enomoto Takeaki and others occupied the five-pointed star fortress, {{ill|Goryōkaku|ja|五稜郭}} , in Hakodate.
== Births == * {{ill|Manrei|ja|万暦}} 20th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1592|ja|1592}} {{ill|November 28|ja|11月28日}} ） – {{ill|Hontai-ji|ja|ホンタイジ}} (皇太極), the 2nd emperor of the Qing († {{ill|1643|ja|1643}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868}} {{ill|December 8|ja|12月8日}} ） – {{ill|Tokutomi Roka|ja|徳富蘆花}} , a novelist († {{ill|1927|ja|1927}} ).
== Deaths ==
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|24|10|26|9|25|11|10|1025}}

[[sn:October 25 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 25일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月25日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 25일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿五]] [[zh:十月廿五]] [[en:draft:October 25 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 25''' is the 25th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Shōgen|ja|承元}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1207|ja|1207}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – The era was changed from {{ill|Ken'ei|ja|建永}} to {{ill|Shōgen|ja|承元}} . * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1637|ja|1637}} {{ill|December 11|ja|12月11日}} ） – The Shimabara Rebellion: Farmers from Amakusa and Shimabara rose against oppressive daimyō and anti-Christian policies. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1858|ja|1858}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}} ） – {{ill|Tokugawa Iemochi|ja|徳川家茂}} ascended as the 14th shōgun. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868}} {{ill|December 8|ja|12月8日}} ） – Enomoto Takeaki and others occupied the five-pointed star fortress, {{ill|Goryōkaku|ja|五稜郭}} , in Hakodate.
== Births == * {{ill|Manrei|ja|万暦}} 20th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1592|ja|1592}} {{ill|November 28|ja|11月28日}} ） – {{ill|Hontai-ji|ja|ホンタイジ}} (皇太極), the 2nd emperor of the Qing († {{ill|1643|ja|1643}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868}} {{ill|December 8|ja|12月8日}} ） – {{ill|Tokutomi Roka|ja|徳富蘆花}} , a novelist († {{ill|1927|ja|1927}} ).
== Deaths ==
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==

[[sn:October 25 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 25일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月25日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 25일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿五]] [[zh:十月廿五]] [[en:draft:October 25 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 25''' is the 25th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Shōgen|ja|承元}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1207|ja|1207}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – The era was changed from {{ill|Ken'ei|ja|建永}} to {{ill|Shōgen|ja|承元}} . * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1637|ja|1637}} {{ill|December 11|ja|12月11日}} ） – The Shimabara Rebellion: Farmers from Amakusa and Shimabara rose against oppressive daimyō and anti-Christian policies. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1858|ja|1858}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}} ） – {{ill|Tokugawa Iemochi|ja|徳川家茂}} ascended as the 14th shōgun. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868}} {{ill|December 8|ja|12月8日}} ） – Enomoto Takeaki and others occupied the five-pointed star fortress, {{ill|Goryōkaku|ja|五稜郭}} , in Hakodate.
== Births == * {{ill|Manrei|ja|万暦}} 20th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1592|ja|1592}} {{ill|November 28|ja|11月28日}} ） – {{ill|Hontai-ji|ja|ホンタイジ}} (皇太極), the 2nd emperor of the Qing († {{ill|1643|ja|1643}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868}} {{ill|December 8|ja|12月8日}} ） – {{ill|Tokutomi Roka|ja|徳富蘆花}} , a novelist († {{ill|1927|ja|1927}} ).

[[sn:October 25 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 25일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月25日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 25일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿五]] [[zh:十月廿五]] [[en:draft:October 25 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 25''' is the 25th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Shōgen|ja|承元}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1207|ja|1207}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – The era was changed from {{ill|Ken'ei|ja|建永}} to {{ill|Shōgen|ja|承元}} . * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1637|ja|1637}} {{ill|December 11|ja|12月11日}} ） – The Shimabara Rebellion: Farmers from Amakusa and Shimabara rose against oppressive daimyō and anti-Christian policies. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1858|ja|1858}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}} ） – {{ill|Tokugawa Iemochi|ja|徳川家茂}} ascended as the 14th shōgun. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868}} {{ill|December 8|ja|12月8日}} ） – Enomoto Takeaki and others occupied the five-pointed star fortress, {{ill|Goryōkaku|ja|五稜郭}} , in Hakodate.
== Births == * {{ill|Manrei|ja|万暦}} 20th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1592|ja|1592}} {{ill|November 28|ja|11月28日}} ） – {{ill|Hontai-ji|ja|ホンタイジ}} (皇太極), the 2nd emperor of the Qing († {{ill|1643|ja|1643}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868}} {{ill|December 8|ja|12月8日}} ） – {{ill|Tokutomi Roka|ja|徳富蘆花}} , a novelist († {{ill|1927|ja|1927}} ).
== Deaths ==
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|24|10|26|9|25|11|10|1025}}

== Events == * {{ill|Shōgen|ja|承元}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1207|ja|1207}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – The era was changed from {{ill|Ken'ei|ja|建永}} to {{ill|Shōgen|ja|承元}} . * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1637|ja|1637}} {{ill|December 11|ja|12月11日}} ） – The Shimabara Rebellion: Farmers from Amakusa and Shimabara rose against oppressive daimyō and anti-Christian policies. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1858|ja|1858}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}} ） – {{ill|Tokugawa Iemochi|ja|徳川家茂}} ascended as the 14th shōgun. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868}} {{ill|December 8|ja|12月8日}} ） – Enomoto Takeaki and others occupied the five-pointed star fortress, {{ill|Goryōkaku|ja|五稜郭}} , in Hakodate.
== Births == * {{ill|Manrei|ja|万暦}} 20th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1592|ja|1592}} {{ill|November 28|ja|11月28日}} ） – {{ill|Hontai-ji|ja|ホンタイジ}} (皇太極), the 2nd emperor of the Qing († {{ill|1643|ja|1643}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868}} {{ill|December 8|ja|12月8日}} ） – {{ill|Tokutomi Roka|ja|徳富蘆花}} , a novelist († {{ill|1927|ja|1927}} ).
== Deaths ==
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|24|10|26|9|25|11|10|1025}}

== Events == * {{ill|Shōgen|ja|承元|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1207|ja|1207|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – The era was changed from {{ill|Ken'ei|ja|建永|12=draft|12=draft}} to {{ill|Shōgen|ja|承元|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1637|ja|1637|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 11|ja|12月11日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – The Shimabara Rebellion: Farmers from Amakusa and Shimabara rose against oppressive daimyō and anti-Christian policies. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1858|ja|1858|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Tokugawa Iemochi|ja|徳川家茂|12=draft|12=draft}} ascended as the 14th shōgun. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 8|ja|12月8日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Enomoto Takeaki and others occupied the five-pointed star fortress, {{ill|Goryōkaku|ja|五稜郭|12=draft|12=draft}} , in Hakodate.
== Births == * {{ill|Manrei|ja|万暦|12=draft|12=draft}} 20th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1592|ja|1592|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 28|ja|11月28日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Hontai-ji|ja|ホンタイジ|12=draft|12=draft}} (皇太極), the 2nd emperor of the Qing († {{ill|1643|ja|1643|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 8|ja|12月8日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Tokutomi Roka|ja|徳富蘆花|12=draft|12=draft}} , a novelist († {{ill|1927|ja|1927|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths ==
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|24|10|26|9|25|11|10|1025}}

{{cdo:10 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)}} {{zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)}} {{zh-yue:十月廿五}} {{zh:十月廿五}} ==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar October]] [[Category:Butsumetsu]] [[Category:Days 25 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:completion tier 5]] [[Category:Lunisolar]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] }} [[sn:October 25 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 25일]] [[ja:10月25日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:十月廿五]] [[en:draft:October 25 (Lunisolar)]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月25日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 25일]][[zh_min_nan:10 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十月廿五]][[zh:十月廿五]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840056]] Wikidata name: 25th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 25|qq=October 25}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 25일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 25''' is the 25th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .

== Events == * [[:en:Jōgen (Kamakura period)|Shōgen]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1207|1207]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – The era was changed from [[:en:Ken'ei|Ken'ei]] to [[:en:Jōgen (Kamakura period)|Shōgen]] . * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1637|1637]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]] ） – The Shimabara Rebellion: Farmers from Amakusa and Shimabara rose against oppressive daimyō and anti-Christian policies. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Tokugawa Iemochi|Tokugawa Iemochi]] ascended as the 14th shōgun. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]] ） – Enomoto Takeaki and others occupied the five-pointed star fortress, [[:en:Goryōkaku|Goryōkaku]] , in Hakodate.
== Births == * {{ill|Manrei|ja|万暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Manrei|qq=|1=Wanli era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1055684}} 20th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1592|1592]] [[:en:November 28|November 28]] ） – [[:en:Hong Taiji|Hontai-ji]] (皇太極), the 2nd emperor of the Qing († [[:en:1643|1643]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]] ） – {{ill|Tokutomi Roka|ja|徳富蘆花|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokutomi Roka|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 徳冨蘆花|1=Kenjirō Tokutomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1396764}} , a novelist († [[:en:1927|1927]] ).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月25日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 25일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月廿五]][[zh:十月廿五]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840056]] Wikidata name: 25th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 25|qq=October 25}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 25일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 25''' is the 25th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Jōgen (Kamakura period)|Shōgen]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1207|1207]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – The era was changed from [[:en:Ken'ei|Ken'ei]] to [[:en:Jōgen (Kamakura period)|Shōgen]] . * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1637|1637]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]] ） – The Shimabara Rebellion: Farmers from Amakusa and Shimabara rose against oppressive daimyō and anti-Christian policies. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Tokugawa Iemochi|Tokugawa Iemochi]] ascended as the 14th shōgun. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]] ） – Enomoto Takeaki and others occupied the five-pointed star fortress, [[:en:Goryōkaku|Goryōkaku]] , in Hakodate.
== Births == * {{ill|Manrei|ja|万暦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Manrei|1=Wanli era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1055684}} 20th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1592|1592]] [[:en:November 28|November 28]] ） – [[:en:Hong Taiji|Hontai-ji]] (皇太極), the 2nd emperor of the Qing († [[:en:1643|1643]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]] ） – {{ill|Tokutomi Roka|ja|徳富蘆花|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokutomi Roka|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 徳冨蘆花|1=Kenjirō Tokutomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1396764}} , a novelist († [[:en:1927|1927]] ).
== Deaths ==

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 25일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 25''' is the 25th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Jōgen (Kamakura period)|Shōgen]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1207|1207]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – The era was changed from [[:en:Ken'ei|Ken'ei]] to [[:en:Jōgen (Kamakura period)|Shōgen]] . * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1637|1637]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]] ） – The Shimabara Rebellion: Farmers from Amakusa and Shimabara rose against oppressive daimyō and anti-Christian policies. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Tokugawa Iemochi|Tokugawa Iemochi]] ascended as the 14th shōgun. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]] ） – Enomoto Takeaki and others occupied the five-pointed star fortress, [[:en:Goryōkaku|Goryōkaku]] , in Hakodate.
== Births == * {{ill|Manrei|ja|万暦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Manrei|1=Wanli era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1055684}} 20th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1592|1592]] [[:en:November 28|November 28]] ） – [[:en:Hong Taiji|Hontai-ji]] (皇太極), the 2nd emperor of the Qing († [[:en:1643|1643]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]] ） – {{ill|Tokutomi Roka|ja|徳富蘆花|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokutomi Roka|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 徳冨蘆花|1=Kenjirō Tokutomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1396764}} , a novelist († [[:en:1927|1927]] ).
== Deaths ==

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 25일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 25''' is the 25th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Jōgen (Kamakura period)|Shōgen]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1207|1207]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – The era was changed from [[:en:Ken'ei|Ken'ei]] to [[:en:Jōgen (Kamakura period)|Shōgen]] . * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1637|1637]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]] ） – The Shimabara Rebellion: Farmers from Amakusa and Shimabara rose against oppressive daimyō and anti-Christian policies. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Tokugawa Iemochi|Tokugawa Iemochi]] ascended as the 14th shōgun. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]] ） – Enomoto Takeaki and others occupied the five-pointed star fortress, [[:en:Goryōkaku|Goryōkaku]] , in Hakodate.
== Births == * {{ill|Manrei|ja|万暦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Manrei|1=Wanli era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1055684}} 20th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1592|1592]] [[:en:November 28|November 28]] ） – [[:en:Hong Taiji|Hontai-ji]] (皇太極), the 2nd emperor of the Qing († [[:en:1643|1643]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]] ） – {{ill|Tokutomi Roka|ja|徳富蘆花|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokutomi Roka|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 徳冨蘆花|1=Kenjirō Tokutomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1396764}} , a novelist († [[:en:1927|1927]] ).

== Events == * [[:en:Jōgen (Kamakura period)|Shōgen]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1207|1207]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – The era was changed from [[:en:Ken'ei|Ken'ei]] to [[:en:Jōgen (Kamakura period)|Shōgen]] . * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1637|1637]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]] ） – The Shimabara Rebellion: Farmers from Amakusa and Shimabara rose against oppressive daimyō and anti-Christian policies. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Tokugawa Iemochi|Tokugawa Iemochi]] ascended as the 14th shōgun. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]] ） – Enomoto Takeaki and others occupied the five-pointed star fortress, [[:en:Goryōkaku|Goryōkaku]] , in Hakodate.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月25日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 25일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十月廿五]][[zh:十月廿五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月25日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 25일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十月廿五]][[zh:十月廿五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月25日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 25일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月廿五]][[zh:十月廿五]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840056]] Wikidata name: 25th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 25|qq=October 25}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 25일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 25''' is the 25th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Jōgen (Kamakura period)|Shōgen]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1207|1207]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – The era was changed from [[:en:Ken'ei|Ken'ei]] to [[:en:Jōgen (Kamakura period)|Shōgen]] . * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1637|1637]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]] ） – The Shimabara Rebellion: Farmers from Amakusa and Shimabara rose against oppressive daimyō and anti-Christian policies. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Tokugawa Iemochi|Tokugawa Iemochi]] ascended as the 14th shōgun. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]] ） – Enomoto Takeaki and others occupied the five-pointed star fortress, [[:en:Goryōkaku|Goryōkaku]] , in Hakodate.
== Births == * {{ill|Manrei|ja|万暦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Manrei|1=Wanli era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1055684}} 20th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1592|1592]] [[:en:November 28|November 28]] ） – [[:en:Hong Taiji|Hontai-ji]] (皇太極), the 2nd emperor of the Qing († [[:en:1643|1643]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]] ） – {{ill|Tokutomi Roka|ja|徳富蘆花|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokutomi Roka|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 徳冨蘆花|1=Kenjirō Tokutomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1396764}} , a novelist († [[:en:1927|1927]] ).
== Deaths ==

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 25일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 25''' is the 25th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Jōgen (Kamakura period)|en|Jōgen (Kamakura period)|WD=Q1194389|lt=Shōgen}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1207|en|1207|WD=Q5232|lt=1207}} {{ill|November 16|en|November 16|WD=Q3029|lt=November 16}} ） – The era was changed from {{ill|Ken'ei|en|Ken'ei|WD=Q1194153|lt=Ken'ei}} to {{ill|Jōgen (Kamakura period)|en|Jōgen (Kamakura period)|WD=Q1194389|lt=Shōgen}} . * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|WD=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1637|en|1637|WD=Q6889|lt=1637}} {{ill|December 11|en|December 11|WD=Q2363|lt=December 11}} ） – The Shimabara Rebellion: Farmers from Amakusa and Shimabara rose against oppressive daimyō and anti-Christian policies. * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1858|en|1858|WD=Q7684|lt=1858}} {{ill|November 30|en|November 30|WD=Q3015|lt=November 30}} ） – {{ill|Tokugawa Iemochi|en|Tokugawa Iemochi|WD=Q348466|lt=Tokugawa Iemochi}} ascended as the 14th shōgun. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868}} {{ill|December 8|en|December 8|WD=Q2301|lt=December 8}} ） – Enomoto Takeaki and others occupied the five-pointed star fortress, {{ill|Goryōkaku|en|Goryōkaku|WD=Q1196357|lt=Goryōkaku}} , in Hakodate.
== Births == * {{ill|Manrei|ja|万暦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Manrei|1=Wanli era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1055684}} 20th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1592|en|1592|WD=Q6769|lt=1592}} {{ill|November 28|en|November 28|WD=Q3017|lt=November 28}} ） – {{ill|Hong Taiji|en|Hong Taiji|WD=Q296367|lt=Hontai-ji}} (皇太極), the 2nd emperor of the Qing († {{ill|1643|en|1643|WD=Q6917|lt=1643}} ). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868}} {{ill|December 8|en|December 8|WD=Q2301|lt=December 8}} ） – {{ill|Tokutomi Roka|ja|徳富蘆花|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokutomi Roka|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 徳冨蘆花|1=Kenjirō Tokutomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1396764}} , a novelist († {{ill|1927|en|1927|WD=Q18110|lt=1927}} ).

{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 25일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 25''' is the 25th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Jōgen (Kamakura period)|en|Jōgen (Kamakura period)|WD=Q1194389|lt=Shōgen}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1207|en|1207|WD=Q5232|lt=1207}} {{ill|November 16|en|November 16|WD=Q3029|lt=November 16}} ） – The era was changed from {{ill|Ken'ei|en|Ken'ei|WD=Q1194153|lt=Ken'ei}} to {{ill|Jōgen (Kamakura period)|en|Jōgen (Kamakura period)|WD=Q1194389|lt=Shōgen}} . * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|WD=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1637|en|1637|WD=Q6889|lt=1637}} {{ill|December 11|en|December 11|WD=Q2363|lt=December 11}} ） – The Shimabara Rebellion: Farmers from Amakusa and Shimabara rose against oppressive daimyō and anti-Christian policies. * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1858|en|1858|WD=Q7684|lt=1858}} {{ill|November 30|en|November 30|WD=Q3015|lt=November 30}} ） – {{ill|Tokugawa Iemochi|en|Tokugawa Iemochi|WD=Q348466|lt=Tokugawa Iemochi}} ascended as the 14th shōgun. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868}} {{ill|December 8|en|December 8|WD=Q2301|lt=December 8}} ） – Enomoto Takeaki and others occupied the five-pointed star fortress, {{ill|Goryōkaku|en|Goryōkaku|WD=Q1196357|lt=Goryōkaku}} , in Hakodate.
== Births == * {{ill|Manrei|ja|万暦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Manrei|1=Wanli era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1055684}} 20th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1592|en|1592|WD=Q6769|lt=1592}} {{ill|November 28|en|November 28|WD=Q3017|lt=November 28}} ） – {{ill|Hong Taiji|en|Hong Taiji|WD=Q296367|lt=Hontai-ji}} (皇太極), the 2nd emperor of the Qing († {{ill|1643|en|1643|WD=Q6917|lt=1643}} ). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868}} {{ill|December 8|en|December 8|WD=Q2301|lt=December 8}} ） – {{ill|Tokutomi Roka|ja|徳富蘆花|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokutomi Roka|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 徳冨蘆花|1=Kenjirō Tokutomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1396764}} , a novelist († {{ill|1927|en|1927|WD=Q18110|lt=1927}} ).

{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 25일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 25''' is the 25th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Jōgen (Kamakura period)|en|Jōgen (Kamakura period)|WD=Q1194389|lt=Shōgen|1=Jōgen (Kamakura period)}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1207|en|1207|WD=Q5232|lt=1207|1=1207}} {{ill|November 16|en|November 16|WD=Q3029|lt=November 16|1=November 16}} ） – The era was changed from {{ill|Ken'ei|en|Ken'ei|WD=Q1194153|lt=Ken'ei|1=Ken'ei}} to {{ill|Jōgen (Kamakura period)|en|Jōgen (Kamakura period)|WD=Q1194389|lt=Shōgen|1=Jōgen (Kamakura period)}} . * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|WD=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei|1=Kan'ei}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1637|en|1637|WD=Q6889|lt=1637|1=1637}} {{ill|December 11|en|December 11|WD=Q2363|lt=December 11|1=December 11}} ） – The Shimabara Rebellion: Farmers from Amakusa and Shimabara rose against oppressive daimyō and anti-Christian policies. * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1858|en|1858|WD=Q7684|lt=1858|1=1858}} {{ill|November 30|en|November 30|WD=Q3015|lt=November 30|1=November 30}} ） – {{ill|Tokugawa Iemochi|en|Tokugawa Iemochi|WD=Q348466|lt=Tokugawa Iemochi|1=Tokugawa Iemochi}} ascended as the 14th shōgun. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|December 8|en|December 8|WD=Q2301|lt=December 8|1=December 8}} ） – Enomoto Takeaki and others occupied the five-pointed star fortress, {{ill|Goryōkaku|en|Goryōkaku|WD=Q1196357|lt=Goryōkaku|1=Goryōkaku}} , in Hakodate.
== Births == * {{ill|Manrei|ja|万暦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Manrei|1=Wanli era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1055684}} 20th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1592|en|1592|WD=Q6769|lt=1592|1=1592}} {{ill|November 28|en|November 28|WD=Q3017|lt=November 28|1=November 28}} ） – {{ill|Hong Taiji|en|Hong Taiji|WD=Q296367|lt=Hontai-ji|1=Hong Taiji}} (皇太極), the 2nd emperor of the Qing († {{ill|1643|en|1643|WD=Q6917|lt=1643|1=1643}} ). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|December 8|en|December 8|WD=Q2301|lt=December 8|1=December 8}} ） – {{ill|Tokutomi Roka|ja|徳富蘆花|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokutomi Roka|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 徳冨蘆花|1=Kenjirō Tokutomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1396764}} , a novelist († {{ill|1927|en|1927|WD=Q18110|lt=1927|1=1927}} ).
